scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:sdk && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.dev:deploy: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost && node scripts/gen-env.js && node scripts/sync-frontend.js
